title: Judge Orders Removal of Trump's Name from Kennedy Center
summary: A judge has ordered the removal of Donald Trump's name from the Kennedy Center.
charlotte_impact: Reflects ongoing efforts to distance institutions from the Trump legacy due to his controversial actions and policies.

title: Trump Holds White House Meeting on Iran Deal
summary: Trump holds a key White House meeting to discuss reopening the Strait of Hormuz and destroying uranium related to the Iran deal.
charlotte_impact: The meeting highlights the ongoing tensions and strategic importance of the Iran nuclear deal and regional stability.

title: Police Identify Driver in Virginia Bus Crash That Killed 5
summary: Police have identified the driver involved in the Virginia bus crash that resulted in 5 fatalities and dozens of injuries.
charlotte_impact: The tragic accident underscores the importance of transportation safety and emergency response protocols.

title: Judge Reopens Trump’s $10 Billion Lawsuit Against IRS
summary: A judge has reopened Donald Trump's lawsuit demanding $10 billion from the IRS.
charlotte_impact: The renewed legal battle could have significant implications for Trump's finances and the IRS's auditing practices.

title: Judge Blocks Payouts from Trump's $1.776 Billion Settlement Fund
summary: A judge temporarily blocks payouts from Trump's $1.776 billion 'anti-weaponization' settlement fund.
charlotte_impact: The block raises questions about the distribution and legality of the settlement fund.

title: Poll Shows Becerra Ahead in California Governor’s Race
summary: A second poll indicates that Becerra is leading in the California governor’s race.
charlotte_impact: The poll results provide insights into the evolving political landscape and voter preferences in California.

title: Fears of Travel Chaos as Mullin Weighs Pulling Customs Officers
summary: Concerns arise about potential travel chaos as Mullin considers removing customs officers from Newark airport.
charlotte_impact: The decision could lead to significant disruptions in air travel and increased wait times for passengers.

title: Documentarian Seeks to Portray the Real E. Jean Carroll
summary: A documentarian is working on a project to portray the real E. Jean Carroll.

title: ICE Agent Wanted in Minneapolis Shooting Captured in Texas
summary: An ICE agent wanted in connection with a shooting in Minneapolis has been captured in Texas.

title: Louisiana Approves Map Eliminating a Majority-Black District
summary: Louisiana approves a map that eliminates a majority-Black district.

title: Russian Official Warns Europe of More Drone Incidents

title: Fonseca Thunders Past Djokovic - Roland-Garros 2026

title: Putin Trying to Grow Human Organs Inside Mini-Pigs
summary: Vladimir Putin is reportedly trying to grow human organs inside mini-pigs.

title: Blue Origin Rocket Blows Up; SpaceMobile and Rocket Lab Stocks Fall
